name: Meredith Willson
description: American composer, conductor, musical arranger, flautist, bandleader and playwright (1902-1984)
abstract: Robert Reiniger Meredith Willson (May 18, 1902 – June 15, 1984) was an American flautist, composer, conductor, musical arranger, bandleader, playwright, and writer. He is perhaps best known for writing the book, music, and lyrics for the 1957 hit Broadway musical The Music Man and "It's Beginning to Look a Lot Like Christmas" (1951).

concerts.label: Luella Melius, Josef Lhévinne, and Musical Art Quartet
